how good is e3 mouchette? and whats her best team?

**Day 2 Mouchette Impressions** (Aggregated from current top EN players)

**Is Mouchette Powerful:** She is an ok, A~B tier dps. She can clear content. She is not top tier or overpowered. She won't break records unless you invest heavily and whale for her and her wheel

**Stopping Point for Pulls:** E3, but OE is good. I don't recommend using her before E3

**Best Teams:** Mouchette, Helot, Thais, Aigis/other supports. High investment accounts can also try mono chaos with Mouchette, Hameln, Ramona, Ryker/Alva

**Can I Use Her With Lotan/Gelot:** I don't recommend it as you will effectively have 2 dps on the team. A support that adds a damage multiplier to Mouchette, or adds defense or utility which Mouchette lacks, will be more effective than another dps

**Covenant:** Dreams of Medicine (recommended) or Burial Grounds' Sighs (if you have a good set). Prioritize Crit, Death Resist, Keyflare Regen

**Wheels:** Crit, Death Resist, Strike wheels work best. Best in slot are her own wheel + Lily wheel. Lotan wheel, Blade of the Titan, etc. are fine

**Should I Pull Mouchette:** If you like her.

**Should I Pull Mouchette Wheel:** If you are prepared to invest heavily in her. There are other wheels that can substitute

E3 Mouche is really solid, if you want another DPS she’s a good investment, as for best teams there are three different archetypes, Mono/Caro/Ultra

Mono is just classic mono, your Hams, your Rykers, your Karens and whatever else you wanna use, but this one expects the lost investment in Mouche

Caro is probably her best but most expensive teammate wise, Mouche x Helot is a match made in heaven and you tend to pair her also with Thais/Aigis/Faint

Ultra uses Cassiah’s card that brings cards from ultra space, since its a strike she can chain 1 cost->cass card untill you either pull a non 1 cost or run out of arith, this team has potential if you wanna use both Ghelot and Mouche in DTide but probably not the greatest team but you’ll probably want Clem or Horla like most ultra teams

How do I awaken astral reign characters?
Just like any other awakener.
Pull on their banner.
The only thing a character being put in the category of “Faded Legacy” or “Astral Reign” indicates is in which arc were they released in.
We are currently in arc 2 (Astral Reign), so any newly released characters will be astral reign characters.
Oh alright, thank you
opinions on Tulu wheel? (how good is it, who do I put it on, etc)

After completing chapter 9, you unlock a new story tab for arc 2. Arc 1 is Faded Legacy, Arc 2 is Astral Reign.

When selecting a stage, you can see which arc ruleset they use on a corner somewhere. You can click on them to show modifiers and the relics present on that stage.

Can someone explain the crimson furnace mechanic to me like I’m stupid I’m still a bit confused by it
Crimson furnace builds up when you take damage. You can use that furnace to heal, or with certain characters, use it to do various things

it doesn't build when you get hit, unless you get the relic that does that(and maybe Salv not sure don't have him), it builds up at turn start by 6% of max hp(3% if not pure Caro), and at battle end by 5% of max hp+5% per embryo still in hand. Max 25%
